exemplar.title: Prompt 9: Are some types of knowledge less open to interpretation then others?

detailedExemplarData.title: Prompt 9: Are some types of knowledge less open to interpretation then others?

strengths: Clear identification of the chosen IA prompt, ensuring focus on interpretative openness
Personal real-world context provided for the periodic table, demonstrating awareness of subjectivity in scientific knowledge
Recognition of the role of personal knowledge in shaping interpretation, showing understanding of subjective influences
weaknesses: Two objects (painting and magazine page) treated as generic images without specific context
Links between objects and the prompt are asserted rather than analyzed, lacking depth and TOK terminology
Commentary is largely descriptive and unsupported, with no engagement of counter-arguments or appropriate evidence
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The student fulfills the minimal structural requirementsâthree objects linked to the promptâand demonstrates basic insights into subjectivity and objectivity. However, two of the three objects lack specific real-world context, and all discussions remain at a surface level, repeating unsupported assertions rather than exploring evidence, methods or counter-arguments. TOK terminology beyond âsubjective/objectiveâ is absent, and the analysis never moves beyond broad descriptions. These characteristics place the work firmly in the 1â2 band. Awarding 2 marks reflects the presence of basic strengths alongside significant weaknesses in analysis, justification and use of TOK concepts.

annotations.comment: The studentâs clear identification of IA prompt 9 lays a focused foundation, ensuring that subsequent object analyses align with the central question regarding interpretative openness.
The object title formatting includes mismatched punctuation and quotesâconsider revising this label for clarity and consistency, ensuring it accurately reflects the artworkâs name.
The caption references a generic online image without establishing a personal or specific real-world context, weakening the criterion of context specificity for the exhibition.
The description of The Last Supper is purely narrative; it lacks a connection to TOK concepts and offers no justification for why this painting uniquely addresses the prompt.
The discussion of interpretation remains surface-level and avoids formal TOK terminologyâintegrate concepts such as ways of knowing, AOKs, or community validation to deepen the analysis.
The student correctly recognizes the role of personal knowledge in shaping interpretation, demonstrating an understanding of subjective influences on meaning.
To strengthen this point, explicitly link personal knowledge to TOK terminology (e.g., âpersonal knowledgeâ, âshared knowledgeâ) and consider contrasting perspectives to enhance depth.
The claim that subjective knowledge âcan be easily overturnedâ is asserted without evidence or examples, resulting in a repetition of unsubstantiated broad statements.
Include a concrete example or case study to support the claim about overturning interpretationsâthis will provide evidence and relevance to the chosen IA prompt.
Personal context for the periodic table is clearly stated, fulfilling the requirement for specific real-world context and strengthening object relevance.
The example of laws of motion is well chosen to illustrate scientific objectivity, demonstrating an understanding of empirical validation and consensus in the natural sciences.
Enhance this section by explicitly relating how empirical methods limit interpretation and referencing the chosen promptâs focus on interpretative openness across knowledge types.
Consider directly linking the periodic tableâs objectivity to the prompt: explain why certain scientific representations resist multiple interpretations compared to other knowledge forms.
How might subjective choices in data presentation or classification challenge the assumed objectivity of scientific knowledge represented by this table?
This discussion on bias reduction remains abstract and does not ground TOK methodology explicitly; it reads as general commentary rather than a focused link to the IA prompt.
Introduce key TOK terms (e.g., âmethodologyâ, âvalidationâ, âcommunity of knowersâ) to articulate how scientific methods reduce interpretative variation.
Incorporate a concrete exampleâsuch as peer review in scientific publishingâto illustrate how methods limit bias and support the objectivity claim.
Which element of the chosen prompt (âless open to interpretationâ) does this explanation directly address, and could this connection be made clearer?
The section header contains HTML encoding artifacts (â">ââ), indicating a formatting errorârevise for readability and accurate titling of Object 3.
This description of the magazine article remains descriptive without establishing a specific provenance or personal context, reducing its relevance to âreal-world contextâ criterion.
The analysis asserts that truth evolves with new evidence but does not engage with counter-arguments or explain how this specifically relates to differences in interpretative openness.
Strengthen this point by contrasting the magazineâs reinterpretation with a scientific response, highlighting how different communities negotiate truth claims.
The account of conspiracy views is presented without integrating TOK frameworks; it describes opinions rather than analyzing knowledge processes and interpretative limits.
Explore an additional area of knowledge (e.g., mathematics or ethics) to enrich the discussion on interpretative flexibility beyond art, science, and media.
The concluding remarks repeat earlier claims instead of advancing the argument or connecting all three objects with the prompt for a cohesive exhibition.
Consider concluding with a synthesis that compares the objectsâ varying degrees of interpretative openness, explicitly tying back to the prompt.
Which element of the chosen prompt (âless open to interpretationâ) does this explanation directly address, and could this connection be made clearer?

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
